languages.text: "Зачем же закладывать? Я готов{mf||а} выкупить его у тебя здесь же. Плачу любую сумму на твое усмотрение. К тому же, мои люди могут сопроводить тебя до Футфола".

traits.locale_text: [драфт]Говорим, что готовы сами у него меч выкупить, и даже на Футфол потом подбросить

languages.text: "Why go all that way to sell it? I'll buy it from you here — just name your price. And what's more, I can have my people escort you to Footfall afterward."
languages.original_text: "Зачем же закладывать? Я готов{mf||а} выкупить его у тебя здесь же. Плачу любую сумму на твое усмотрение. К тому же, мои люди могут сопроводить тебя до Футфола".

traits.locale_text: "Why go all that way to sell it? I'll buy it from you here — just name your price. And what's more, I can have my people escort you to Footfall afterward."
"Why go all that way to sell it? I'll buy it from you here — just name your price. And what's more, I can have my people escort you to Footfall afterward."
"Why go all that way to sell it? I'll buy it from you here — just name your price. And what's more, I can have my people escort you to Footfall afterward."

languages.text: «¿Por qué ir tan lejos para venderla? Se la puedo comprar aquí mismo; dígame cuánto pide por ella. Añadiré además un viaje a Paso con escolta».
languages.original_text: "Why go all that way to sell it? I'll buy it from you here — just name your price. And what's more, I can have my people escort you to Footfall afterward."

traits.locale_text: «¿Por qué ir tan lejos para venderla? Se la puedo comprar aquí mismo; dígame cuánto pide por ella. Añadiré además un viaje a Paso con escolta».

languages.text: “何必大老远跑到那儿去卖？就在这儿卖给我吧，你开个价。更何况，之后我还可以派人护送你去落脚港。”
languages.original_text: "Why go all that way to sell it? I'll buy it from you here — just name your price. And what's more, I can have my people escort you to Footfall afterward."

traits.locale_text: “何必大老远跑到那儿去卖？就在这儿卖给我吧，你开个价。更何况，之后我还可以派人护送你去落脚港。”

languages.text: « À quoi bon vous donner tant de mal pour la vendre ? Je me propose de vous l'acheter ici même, votre prix sera le mien. Mieux encore, je peux vous fournir une escorte pour vous conduire jusqu'à Castel une fois l'affaire conclue. »
languages.original_text: "Why go all that way to sell it? I'll buy it from you here — just name your price. And what's more, I can have my people escort you to Footfall afterward."

traits.locale_text: « À quoi bon vous donner tant de mal pour la vendre ? Je me propose de vous l'acheter ici même, votre prix sera le mien. Mieux encore, je peux vous fournir une escorte pour vous conduire jusqu'à Castel une fois l'affaire conclue. »

languages.text: "Onu satmak için neden o kadar yol gidesin ki? Onu senden burada satın alacağım. Sadece fiyatını söyle. Dahası, sonrasında adamlarıma seni Binliman'a kadar eşlik ettirebilirim."
languages.original_text: "Why go all that way to sell it? I'll buy it from you here — just name your price. And what's more, I can have my people escort you to Footfall afterward."

traits.locale_text: "Onu satmak için neden o kadar yol gidesin ki? Onu senden burada satın alacağım. Sadece fiyatını söyle. Dahası, sonrasında adamlarıma seni Binliman'a kadar eşlik ettirebilirim."

languages.text: "Wozu die Mühe, um es zu verkaufen? Ich kaufe es Euch ab ... nennt mir nur Euren Preis. Und danach können Euch meine Leute nach Footfall eskortieren."
languages.original_text: "Why go all that way to sell it? I'll buy it from you here — just name your price. And what's more, I can have my people escort you to Footfall afterward."

traits.locale_text: "Wozu die Mühe, um es zu verkaufen? Ich kaufe es Euch ab ... nennt mir nur Euren Preis. Und danach können Euch meine Leute nach Footfall eskortieren."

languages.text: 「わざわざ売りに来るまでもなく、ここで買いますよ。値段はいくらでも言ってください。それに、その後は私の部下たちがあなたをフットフォールまで護衛します」
languages.original_text: "Why go all that way to sell it? I'll buy it from you here — just name your price. And what's more, I can have my people escort you to Footfall afterward."

traits.locale_text: 「わざわざ売りに来るまでもなく、ここで買いますよ。値段はいくらでも言ってください。それに、その後は私の部下たちがあなたをフットフォールまで護衛します」
